title: FPS BOOM!
body:
General, Client-only FPS and  performance enhancements.

1.18.2 -> 0.1.x
1.19    -> 0.2.x

Works for single player, regular spigot/paper based servers, and can be used with Fabric servers.

Additional non-FPS boots are expected if the server has various compatible elements.

This is a PACK - all included mods have their own license, all included mods reside on Modrinth. Built with the help of Packwiz!
